frames.title: The Green Heart from Above
frames.caption: High establishing view of the 2,000 sqm bowl-shaped Event Lawn nested in the eastern cell of the Living Shade Loop, ringed by ghaf groves, terracotta pergolas, kiosk pads and the wadi bioswale.
frames.videogen_prompt: Photorealistic aerial drone shot slowly descending over a bowl-shaped event lawn inside a figure-eight shaded park loop in Dubai at golden hour, ghaf tree groves and terracotta pergolas edging the green, warm desert light, serene and expansive mood.

frames.title: Arriving Under the Slats
frames.caption: Eye-level approach along the shaded loop: terracotta pergola slats rake bands of shadow across the path as it opens onto the sunlit lawn, a kiosk cart waiting at the rim.
frames.videogen_prompt: Photorealistic steadicam walking shot gliding beneath a terracotta-slat pergola along a sandy park path, slatted shadows sweeping the ground, revealing a bright green event lawn ahead, late morning desert light, inviting and calm.

frames.title: A Morning on the Lawn
frames.caption: On the lawn among the regulars: a yoga row on mats, families on picnic blankets, kids chasing a kite, kiosk carts trading at the rim under the ghaf edge canopy.
frames.videogen_prompt: Photorealistic slow dolly move across a busy park lawn in soft morning light, passing a yoga class on mats, families on picnic blankets and children running with a kite, shallow depth of field, warm and communal mood.

frames.title: Banking Over the Loop
frames.caption: Oblique drone sweep banking across the figure-eight loop and wadi bioswale toward the lawn bowl, market stalls and pergola runs flickering past below.
frames.videogen_prompt: Photorealistic FPV drone shot banking low over a shaded figure-eight park loop and a glinting bioswale, then sweeping across a bowl-shaped lawn dotted with market stalls and picnickers, golden afternoon light, dynamic and joyful.

frames.title: Opening Day
frames.caption: Year zero: fresh turf rolls still seaming together, staked ghaf saplings in watering basins at the rim stations, new pergola timber bare, the first visitors arriving.
frames.videogen_prompt: Photorealistic locked-off timelapse-style shot of a newly opened park lawn at midday, staked saplings in watering basins along a fresh path, sparse young turf with sandy patches, bright optimistic desert light, sense of beginning.

frames.title: Year Two
frames.caption: Same view, two summers on: stakes off, adolescent ghaf canopies casting their first pools of shade, vines starting up the pergola, the turf knitted and deepening.
frames.videogen_prompt: Photorealistic locked-off shot of the same park lawn two years on, young ghaf trees with filling canopies casting small shade pools, first vines climbing a terracotta pergola, warm late-afternoon light, quiet steady growth.

frames.title: Year Five
frames.caption: Same view at maturity: interlocking ghaf canopies close over the rim and lean into frame, vine-wrapped pergola, dappled shade drifting across a deep established sward.
frames.videogen_prompt: Photorealistic locked-off shot of a mature park lawn edged by a continuous ghaf canopy, dappled shade drifting over deep green grass as branches sway overhead, honeyed evening light, settled and abundant mood.

frames.title: Cinema Night
frames.caption: The same lawn after dark: an outdoor cinema screen glows on the far rim, string lights swoop over blanket-seated crowds, kiosk carts flicker, ink sky salted with stars.
frames.videogen_prompt: Photorealistic slow push-in at night across a park lawn full of people on blankets watching a glowing outdoor cinema screen, string lights swaying overhead, food kiosks glowing at the rim under a starry sky, cosy festive mood.
